textByHash.8420e2df875ad47ed84f8fddf5b59acd452fa53d: If you want me to bite your fingers off, you're going the right way about it!
textByHash.e433d89a04514dc6e52cbf4e254c2bed926027c9: Watch who you're calling a filthy beast, human.
textByHash.084cea6ab16697fe89b98da047f621d727db553e: And you'd make an excellent spit bucket! Pchoo!
textByHash.6206f2de6209a8095c7821e53230633a170d567a: You're fairly nasty yourself, human. When was the last time you took a shower?
